introSection:
Mirage Rosso is a Fabbri inverted roller coaster located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Puglia, Italy.

During the 2022 season the ride was closed for refurbishment. All trains have been dismantled and completely overhauled. The seats, previously blue, were rebuilt yellow with black restraints. All the track was repainted with the same color..

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The ride is painted red with unpainted supports.

sections.title: Curiosity
sections.content: In a Fabbri promotional video released in the late 1990s, it is possible to see a model and the engineering team designing the Mistral 63

fullText:
Mirage Rosso is a Fabbri inverted roller coaster located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Puglia, Italy.

During the 2022 season the ride was closed for refurbishment. All trains have been dismantled and completely overhauled. The seats, previously blue, were rebuilt yellow with black restraints. All the track was repainted with the same color..



The ride is painted red with unpainted supports.





In a Fabbri promotional video released in the late 1990s, it is possible to see a model and the engineering team designing the Mistral 63
